$comment: Single source of truth for the ReactOmega registry. scripts/build-registry.mjs reads this + the component source files to generate registry.json, public/r/*.json (shadcn-compatible), and llms.txt. 'uses' lists internal registry dependencies (primitives). 'dependencies' lists npm packages a consumer must install.

utils.title: cn() utility
utils.description: Tailwind class merge helper used by every component.

use-prefers-reduced-motion.title: usePrefersReducedMotion()
use-prefers-reduced-motion.description: React hook that tracks the user's reduced-motion preference; motion components degrade gracefully when it is true.

split-text.title: Split Text
split-text.description: Reveals text per character or word on scroll into view with a staggered spring rise. Screen-reader safe via aria-label.

shiny-text.title: Shiny Text
shiny-text.description: A soft highlight sweeps across text on a loop. Pure CSS, zero dependencies.

gradient-text.title: Gradient Text
gradient-text.description: An animated multi-stop gradient flows through the text. Pure CSS.

count-up.title: Count Up
count-up.description: Rolls a number from a start to a target with ease-out, optionally when scrolled into view. tabular-nums prevents width jitter.

magnetic.title: Magnetic
magnetic.description: Wraps any element so it drifts toward the pointer and springs back on leave. Mouse-only, reduced-motion safe.

spotlight-card.title: Spotlight Card
spotlight-card.description: A card with a soft radial spotlight that tracks the pointer and fades on enter/leave.

tilt-card.title: Tilt Card
tilt-card.description: A 3D card that tilts toward the pointer with an optional moving glare. Flat and static for reduced-motion users.

click-spark.title: Click Spark
click-spark.description: Emits a radial spark burst from the exact click point on a self-clearing canvas overlay.

dot-grid.title: Dot Grid
dot-grid.description: An interactive dot field that lights up and swells around the pointer. A modern, non-cosmic backdrop.

star-border.title: Star Border
star-border.description: Two soft glints travel continuously around the border of any element. Pure CSS.

dock.title: Dock
dock.description: A macOS-style magnifying dock; items swell based on pointer distance. Renders as a toolbar.

marquee.title: Marquee
marquee.description: A seamless infinite scroller (horizontal or vertical) with edge fade and pause-on-hover.

variable-proximity.title: Variable Proximity
variable-proximity.description: Every letter's variable-font axes (weight, width, optical size, slant, or any custom axis) interpolate based on pointer distance. Fully configurable axes, radius, and falloff curve. Needs a variable font.

magnetic-text.title: Magnetic Text
magnetic-text.description: Every letter is independently magnetic, springing toward the pointer and easing back with real spring physics. Configurable strength, radius, stiffness, damping.

gravity-text.title: Gravity Text
gravity-text.description: Letters detach and fall under real gravity, bounce off the floor with friction, then reassemble. Configurable gravity, bounce, friction, scatter, and trigger.

elastic-text.title: Elastic Text
elastic-text.description: Letters swell and lift with a springy, overshooting jelly squash-and-stretch as the pointer passes. Configurable stiffness, damping, scale, lift, radius.

scramble-text.title: Scramble Text
scramble-text.description: Letters churn through random glyphs and lock in left-to-right like a decoding terminal. Configurable charset, speed, reveal wipe, and trigger.

spring-mesh.title: Spring Mesh
spring-mesh.description: An elastic lattice: every node is sprung to rest and coupled to its neighbors, so pressing the pointer sends real waves rippling outward that settle naturally.

cloth.title: Cloth
cloth.description: A real verlet-integrated fabric hanging from a pinned top edge under gravity. Grab any point and it folds, swings, and settles like cloth.

metaballs.title: Metaballs
metaballs.description: A gooey fluid that flows toward the pointer and merges with surface-tension feel via an SVG goo filter. Configurable count, color, size, and viscosity.

holographic-card.title: Holographic Card
holographic-card.description: An iridescent holo-foil card: a rainbow sheen and bright glare track the pointer with a color-dodge blend, over a subtle 3D tilt. Configurable tilt, intensity, and foil colors.

text-reveal.title: Text Reveal
text-reveal.description: Words brighten one after another as the block scrolls through the viewport — a scroll-linked reading spotlight. Configurable dim/lit colors and edge softness.

rope.title: Rope
rope.description: A verlet-integrated rope hangs from a fixed anchor — grab it, drag it, and watch it swing and settle under gravity.

pendulum-wave.title: Pendulum Wave
pendulum-wave.description: A row of pendulums with subtly increasing lengths drift in and out of phase to form the classic traveling pendulum-wave pattern.

newtons-cradle.title: Newton's Cradle
newtons-cradle.description: An interactive Newton's cradle — pull an end ball back, release, and momentum transfers through the row to fling the far ball out.

water-ripple.title: Water Ripple
water-ripple.description: A height-field water surface where pointer input spawns ripples that spread, reflect off edges, and shade from the local height gradient.

gravity-wells.title: Gravity Wells
gravity-wells.description: Hundreds of particles orbit the pointer as a 1/dist^2 gravity well, leaving luminous trails via per-frame translucent fade.

magnetic-field.title: Magnetic Field
magnetic-field.description: A grid of iron-filing segments that re-orient along a dipole field anchored at the pointer, with length and brightness scaling by proximity.

soft-body.title: Soft Body
soft-body.description: A poke-able jelly blob held in a circle by perimeter, radius, and pressure springs that wobbles and recovers when you squish it with the pointer.

plucked-string.title: Plucked String
plucked-string.description: A string pinned at both ends that you grab and pluck, then watch vibrate with a realistic decaying wave driven by neighbor-averaging physics.

falling-sand.title: Falling Sand
falling-sand.description: A falling-sand cellular automaton where dragging the pointer pours colored grains that fall and slide diagonally into realistic piling mounds.
